name: ASUS Z790-AYW WIFI W II ATX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1700 - 1x PCIe 5.0 x16 - 3x PCIe 4.0 x16 - Support DDR5-8000+(OC) - 3x M.2 Slots - USB 10Gbps Type-C+A - HDMI 2.1 - Realtek 2.5G LAN - Wi-Fi 6 802.11ax - Bluetooth 5.3 - Thunderbolt USB4 Header
shortName: ASUS Z790-AYW WIFI W II ATX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1700 - 1x PCIe
description: ATX LGA 1700 motherboard with DDR5-8000+ and PCIe 5.0 x16 for high-end Intel builds.
